meaning: 巴拉顿湖[匈牙利西部](亦称匈牙利海,是中欧最大的湖泊)
examples: Many visitors like to cool off in summer at Lake Balaton, which is an easy train ride from Budapest.
For years his statue stood by the motorway linking Budapest with Lake Balaton, and marked the city's boundaries.
Yachts sail the entire length of the Lake Balaton in this traditional 200-kilometre annual race since the 1930s.
Lake Balaton, the largest lake in central Europe, is also known as the "Hungarian Sea".
Balaton, made with local cherries, is a slice of syrupy roadside-diner pie.
